verses.text: Of those Pilate slew, He says, 'except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish.' No exemption. Calamity calls all to repentance, not to judge others.
Of those Pilate slew, He says, 'except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish.' No exemption. Calamity calls all to repentance, not to judge others.
Of those Pilate slew, He says, 'except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish.' No exemption. Calamity calls all to repentance, not to judge others.
Those crushed by the tower were not the worst; 'except ye repent, ye shall all... perish.' Solemn refrain. The lesson of disaster is to turn to God.
Those crushed by the tower were not the worst; 'except ye repent, ye shall all... perish.' Solemn refrain. The lesson of disaster is to turn to God.
A barren fig tree is spared one more year, then cut down if still fruitless. Patient mercy. God bears long, but fruitlessness has its limit.
A barren fig tree is spared one more year, then cut down if still fruitless. Patient mercy. God bears long, but fruitlessness has its limit.

He looses a woman bowed eighteen years, and she glorifies God. Compassion. He frees the long-afflicted with a word and a touch.
He looses a woman bowed eighteen years, and she glorifies God. Compassion. He frees the long-afflicted with a word and a touch.

The ruler is indignant; ye loose your ox on the sabbath, shall not this daughter of Abraham be loosed? Mercy lawful. Doing good honours, not breaks, God's day.
The ruler is indignant; ye loose your ox on the sabbath, shall not this daughter of Abraham be loosed? Mercy lawful. Doing good honours, not breaks, God's day.
The ruler is indignant; ye loose your ox on the sabbath, shall not this daughter of Abraham be loosed? Mercy lawful. Doing good honours, not breaks, God's day.

The kingdom is like a mustard seed grown into a tree. Small beginnings. God's kingdom spreads from tiny starts to shelter all.
The kingdom is like a mustard seed grown into a tree. Small beginnings. God's kingdom spreads from tiny starts to shelter all.
It is like leaven hid in meal, till all is leavened. Hidden working. The gospel quietly transforms from within.
It is like leaven hid in meal, till all is leavened. Hidden working. The gospel quietly transforms from within.
'Strive to enter in at the strait gate'; many shall seek and not be able. Earnest effort. The way of life is narrow and must be sought in earnest.
'Strive to enter in at the strait gate'; many shall seek and not be able. Earnest effort. The way of life is narrow and must be sought in earnest.
'Strive to enter in at the strait gate'; many shall seek and not be able. Earnest effort. The way of life is narrow and must be sought in earnest.
The master shuts the door, 'I know you not... depart... ye workers of iniquity.' Too late. Mere acquaintance with Christ is not enough.
The master shuts the door, 'I know you not... depart... ye workers of iniquity.' Too late. Mere acquaintance with Christ is not enough.
The master shuts the door, 'I know you not... depart... ye workers of iniquity.' Too late. Mere acquaintance with Christ is not enough.
Many shall come from east and west to the kingdom; 'the last shall be first.' Surprising reversal. Outsiders enter while the privileged are shut out.
Many shall come from east and west to the kingdom; 'the last shall be first.' Surprising reversal. Outsiders enter while the privileged are shut out.

Warned of Herod, He says a prophet must perish at Jerusalem. Resolute. No threat turns Him from His appointed course.
Warned of Herod, He says a prophet must perish at Jerusalem. Resolute. No threat turns Him from His appointed course.
Warned of Herod, He says a prophet must perish at Jerusalem. Resolute. No threat turns Him from His appointed course.
'O Jerusalem... how often would I have gathered thy children, and ye would not!' Yearning love. Christ weeps over the city that spurned His grace.
